description: Regular and Cards Against Humanity style clues about birthday wishes, making wishes, and wish fulfillment

regular_clues.clue: Make a wish and blow out the candles
Don't tell anyone or it won't come true
The magical moment before cake is cut
You get one per year on your special day
Close your eyes and think of what you want most
The ritual before every birthday celebration
Tradition says you must keep this secret
The moment when anything seems possible
What you silently hope for at the birthday table
The candles represent time passing on your special day
One tradition says speaking it aloud breaks the magic
The sweetest moment of the party
Children often wish for toys or adventures
Adults might wish for health, happiness, or success
The moment between thinking and blowing
You get one chance per year to make it
Superstition says this happens if you don't blow them all out
The song plays right before the magical moment
What you hope for when you close your eyes
The most personal moment of the celebration
Blowing with strength might help this come true
Everyone waits quietly for this moment
The light from these is supposed to carry wishes skyward
You're supposed to make one before you cut the cake
This tradition has been practiced for centuries
The belief that this makes dreams come true
Many people make the same one every year
The quiet moment before shared joy
Parents often wish for their child's happiness
The secret you keep locked in your heart

cah_clues.clue: The one thing your parents hoped for when you were born
cah_clues.answer: That you'd move out eventually

cah_clues.clue: What millennials wish for on their birthday
cah_clues.answer: Affordable housing and student loan forgiveness

cah_clues.clue: The wish that never comes true for social media addicts
cah_clues.answer: Getting off their phone for one meal

cah_clues.clue: What your ex secretly wished for on their birthday
cah_clues.answer: That you were better in bed

cah_clues.clue: The birthday wish that most people lie about making
cah_clues.answer: World peace

cah_clues.clue: What your therapist wishes for on your birthday
cah_clues.answer: That you'd finally fix your issues

cah_clues.clue: The wish that gets worse the more you think about it
cah_clues.answer: Eternal youth

cah_clues.clue: What that weird relative wished for when they blew out the candles
cah_clues.answer: Supremacy of their political beliefs

cah_clues.clue: The birthday wish nobody admits to making
cah_clues.answer: That someone else gets fat instead of you

cah_clues.clue: What your crush secretly wished for on their last birthday
cah_clues.answer: That you would stop existing

cah_clues.clue: The one thing nobody wishes for anymore
cah_clues.answer: A flip phone

cah_clues.clue: What Jeff Bezos wishes for on his birthday
cah_clues.answer: More space to store money

cah_clues.clue: The birthday wish that's actually come true
cah_clues.answer: Netflix cancelling shows you love

cah_clues.clue: What that drunk guy at the party wished for
cah_clues.answer: More free drinks

cah_clues.clue: The wish that comes true right after you say it won't
cah_clues.answer: Finding an ex on Instagram

cah_clues.clue: What your parents wished for instead of the gift you received
cah_clues.answer: A child who wasn't so ungrateful

cah_clues.clue: The birthday wish that ruins your day by actually happening
cah_clues.answer: Seeing your ex with someone hotter

cah_clues.clue: What the HR department wished for on your birthday
cah_clues.answer: That you'd quit without a lawsuit

cah_clues.clue: The wish that happens every time you check your bank account
cah_clues.answer: That your money would multiply

cah_clues.clue: What your dog wishes for on your birthday
cah_clues.answer: That you'd finally get home to feed them

cah_clues.clue: The birthday wish that everyone makes but nobody admits
cah_clues.answer: That someone hot would finally notice them

cah_clues.clue: What Elon Musk wishes for on his birthday
cah_clues.answer: A planet with fewer regulations

cah_clues.clue: The wish that comes true in nightmares
cah_clues.answer: Showing up to work naked

cah_clues.clue: What your therapist secretly wishes for on your birthday
cah_clues.answer: That you'd stop texting them off the clock

cah_clues.clue: The birthday wish that's impossible because of inflation
cah_clues.answer: A house you can actually afford

cah_clues.clue: What TikTok teenagers wish for on their birthday
cah_clues.answer: Going viral but for something respectable

cah_clues.clue: The wish that gets progressively sadder each year
cah_clues.answer: Having friends who actually remember your birthday

cah_clues.clue: What your future self wishes you'd decided on your birthday
cah_clues.answer: Not taking that terrible job

cah_clues.clue: The birthday wish that backfires immediately
cah_clues.answer: That you could eat whatever you want

cah_clues.clue: What the birthday cake is really wishing for
cah_clues.answer: To not be stuck with expired candles

characteristics.regular: Traditional birthday wish concepts, cultural and personal significance
characteristics.cah: Dark humor, contemporary references, relatable frustrations, millennial/Gen-Z perspective
